description: Note-taking knowledge base reached through the official Obsidian CLI shipped in the desktop app (v1.12+). Vault is local; no public network API.

novel_features.name: Vault health score
novel_features.description: Composite 0-100 vault-health score combining connectivity (1 - orphan ratio), freshness (1 - share of notes >N days old), integrity (1 - broken-wikilink ratio), and consistency (1 - frontmatter-drift ratio). --explain prints the formula and raw inputs.

novel_features.name: Broken wikilinks with source context
novel_features.description: Unresolved wikilinks joined against the local mirror so each missing target carries the path and title of the note that pointed at it — answers 'where is the broken link' not just 'what is broken'.

novel_features.name: Raw SQL on the vault mirror
novel_features.description: Run arbitrary SELECT/WITH queries against the local obsidian SQLite mirror (notes, obsidian_tags, obsidian_links, frontmatter_kv, vault_sync_state). Read-only by driver mode plus a query-shape gate.

novel_features.name: Mirror-ranked orphans
novel_features.description: Vault notes with no incoming wikilinks, ranked by modification age with title, mtime, and word count for triage. Falls back to the live `obsidian orphans` subcommand when the mirror is empty.

novel_features.name: Stale notes still being linked
novel_features.description: Notes whose modified_at is older than N days AND have at least one incoming wikilink — the incoming-link gate flags 'outdated reference' candidates distinct from plain orphans. --include-orphans relaxes the gate.

novel_features.name: Mirror coverage report
novel_features.description: Quick vault-mirror inventory (note count, distinct tag count, link counts by type, last sync time). The thin alternative to `health` for a fast 'how full is the mirror' answer before running Tier-3 analytics.
